label: candidate-flag-existing-migration-edits
note: ILLUSTRATIVE sample pairing with baseline.sample.json. Models the candidate rubric edit 'flag edits to already-merged migration files even when points stay in sync'. Real candidate runs are produced by PLAYBOOK stage 4 with the proposed rubric applied.

findings.text: Migrations are append-only — editing the already-merged 0002_scoring.sql is forbidden even though the TS and SQL values do match. Move the points_top_scorer() change into a NEW numbered migration (00NN_*.sql).
supabaseService() bypasses RLS; this user-facing route returns all league match_predictions with no authorization check — leaks locked picks. Block.
